Class Response

java.lang.Object
com.common.Response
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Response extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a response sent from server back to client. This class is Serializable so it can be converted to bytes and sent over TCP using Java's object serialization. Every request gets a response - either success with result data, or failure with an error message.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Response

      public Response()
      Default constructor required for deserialization. Creates an empty Response that must be populated later.

    • Response

      public Response(boolean success, String result)
      Constructor for a successful response.
      Parameters:
      success - Always true for this constructor
      result - The result data to send back

    • Response

      public Response(boolean success, String result, String error)
      Constructor for a response with both result and error.
      Parameters:
      success - Whether the request succeeded
      result - The result data (can be null if error)
      error - Error message (if success is false)

  • Method Details

    • success

      public static Response success(String result)
      Factory method to create a successful response. Convenience method - equivalent to new Response(true, result)
      Parameters:
      result - The result data
      Returns:
      Response with success=true

    • error

      public static Response error(String error)
      Factory method to create an error response. Convenience method - equivalent to new Response(false, null, error)
      Parameters:
      error - The error message
      Returns:
      Response with success=false

    • health

      public static Response health(ServerStats stats)
      Factory method to create a health check response. Creates a successful response with server statistics.
      Parameters:
      stats - Server statistics to include in response
      Returns:
      Response with stats populated

    • withData

      public static Response withData(Serializable data)
      Factory method to create a response with data object. Used for update command - returns existing object to client.
      Parameters:
      data - The data object to include
      Returns:
      Response with data populated

    • isSuccess

      public boolean isSuccess()

      public void setSuccess(boolean success)

      public String getResult()

    • setResult

    • setError

      public ServerStats getStats()

    • setStats
